## Summary

What does this PR change, and why does it increase scientific usefulness?

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New baseline / routing policy
- [ ] New dataset preset or loader
- [ ] New metric / visualization
- [ ] Documentation / tutorial
- [ ] Refactor / tooling

## Checklist
- [ ] `ruff check symbiosis_edge tests` passes
- [ ] `pytest -q` passes
- [ ] Added/updated tests for changed behaviour
- [ ] Updated docstrings / docs as needed
- [ ] If results changed, I explain how determinism and comparability are preserved
- [ ] No hand-tuned or fabricated numbers; results come from an actual engine run
